archive_audit.archive_model: one accepted-source archive; family eligibility remains exact and the static linker extracts only referenced members

compiler.version: GNU Fortran (MinGW-W64 x86_64-ucrt-posix-seh, built by Brecht Sanders, r1) 14.2.0

runtime_archives.obligations: Preserve the GCC Runtime Library Exception notice; the final consumer remains relinkable because Cargo links ordinary static archives.

Preserve the LGPL notice and provide the corresponding-source or relinking information required for the static runtime archive. The retained quadmath closure is selected because libgfortran formatted-write members reference quadmath_snprintf; the SLATEC archive has no direct quadmath reference.

runtime_audit.reason: Archive-level audit complete; final consumer import probe is recorded by the release validation command.

runtime_components.distribution_action: include reduced libslatec_bundle_gfortran.a with GPLv3 and Runtime Library Exception notice

runtime_components.actually_referenced: required by libgfortran formatted-write members through quadmath_snprintf, not by the SLATEC archive
runtime_components.distribution_action: include reduced libslatec_bundle_quadmath.a with LGPL-2.1-or-later notice and source/relinking information
no carrier copy; audit final consumer imports

runtime_member_audits.causal_chain: SLATEC XERROR diagnostic formatting -> libgfortran write.o/transfer128.o -> quadmath_snprintf -> libquadmath quadmath-printf.o
